headline: LifeMD, Inc. (LFMD) Reports Q1 Loss, Tops Revenue Estimates
summary: LifeMD (LFMD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -42.86% and +3.97%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Charles River (CRL) Q1 Earnings Preview: What You Should Know Beyond the Headline Estimates
